title: 'Nduja Fried Rice
summary: And you thought we couldn't smash ‘nduja into any more recipes? This is a perfect, spicy, meaty fried rice for one. Go on, treat yourself.

ingredients.label: 4 x 250g Packet of Ready Cooked Basmati Rices
ingredients.name: Cooked Rice

ingredients.label: 4 x 250g Packet of Ready Cooked Basmati Rices
ingredients.name: Rice

method.description: Start by chopping the red pepper, roughly chopping the parsley and mincing the garlic. Next, set a frying pan over a medium-high heat and add the 'nduja and a splash of olive oil.
Break up the 'nduja with a wooden spoon as it cooks and then add the garlic. Fry gently for a couple of minutes then add the tomato purée.
Cook for a minute or so to take the bitterness out of the tomato purée then add the chopped pepper.
Turn up the heat and season. Break up the rice in the bag then pour it into the pan.
Stir everything together, allowing the rice to take on a lovely red colour and cook for a couple of mins. Stir through the parsley then plate up.
Serve with a wedge of lemon and sour cream.

chefs.name: Ben Lippett
chefs.summary: Ben Lippett (@dinnerbyben) is a cook, food writer, recipe developer, and co-founder of Dr Sting's Hot Honey. Ben spent years working at a spate of restaurants in the UK and Australia – including a brief but rewarding stint at a butcher's – before making the leap to food media.
